per_turn_leaks.student_message: When you have those episodes, do you notice anything else happening to your body?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, I've noticed that sometimes when the tightness is really bad, my left arm feels numb and tingly. It's just for a second or two, but it's definitely there. And like I mentioned earlier, I get pretty sweaty during those episodes too.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any sweating or clamminess when the symptoms hit?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, I do get pretty sweaty during those episodes. Like I said before, it comes with this heavy pressure sensation in my chest and makes breathing really hard.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: So no perspiration at all during the episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, like I already mentioned, I do get sweaty when it happens. It's not just a little bit either, I'm pretty drenched by the time the episode is over.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Does the discomfort stay in one spot, or does it move around?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: The tightness stays right in my chest, just below my breastbone. Sometimes when it's really bad, it feels like it spreads a bit to my left arm and back, but it's still mostly concentrated in my chest.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Does it radiate anywhere — like your arms, neck, or jaw?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: The tightness stays right in my chest, just below my breastbone. Sometimes when it's really bad, it feels like it spreads a bit to my left arm and back, but it's still mostly concentrated in my chest. Like I said earlier, during those episodes, I also get this numbness or tingling sensation in my left arm, but only for a second or two.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any tingling or numbness in your arms when it happens?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, like I already mentioned, sometimes when the tightness is really bad, my left arm feels numb and tingly. It's just for a second or two, but it's definitely there.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: What about your extremities — any tingling, pain, or unusual sensations?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: No, other than the occasional numbness in my left arm during those episodes, I don't get any weird sensations in my arms or legs.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you noticed any swelling anywhere? Ankles, feet, hands?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, actually, my ankles and shoes feel a bit tighter than usual lately. But it's not like they're swollen or anything, just feels like I've gained some extra water weight.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do your shoes feel tighter than usual, or any puffiness in your legs?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, actually, my ankles and shoes feel a bit tighter than usual lately. But it's not like they're swollen or anything, just feels like I've gained some extra water weight.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any stomach issues during the episodes? Nausea, queasiness, upset stomach?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, mild nausea during those episodes, no vomiting. It's pretty uncomfortable, but it goes away once the tightness subsides.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you feel sick to your stomach when the symptoms come on?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, I do get a bit of nausea when the chest tightness is really bad, like I mentioned earlier. It's not severe enough to make me want to vomit or anything, but it's definitely there and adds to my overall discomfort.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Specifically, has anyone in your family had serious diseases?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My father had a heart attack when he was 52 years old and passed away. I've always tried to be more mindful of my own health because of that, but like I said earlier, my lifestyle hasn't been exactly conducive to staying healthy.
